items.title: [Remote] Senior Web3/React.js Developer – Token Presale dApp
items.description:
🚨 We’re hiring a **Senior Web3/React.js Developer** to help us scale token sale app — a real-world token presale and staking platform that connects crypto with actual services like food preorders and loyalty rewards.

You’ll be joining a lean, focused team building the next phase of our dApp — including staking mechanics, on-chain rewards, and seamless user dashboards.

**Role Details:**
- **Position:** Senior Software Developer (Solidity / Frontend / Full Stack)
- **Tech Stack:** ethers.js, Solidity, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Vite
- **Work Type:** Fully Remote, async-friendly
- **Schedule:** Full-Time/Part-Time (Up to 40 hrs/week)
- **Compensation:** $120k–$250k/year USD equivalent (based on experience & specialization)

**What We’re Looking For:**
- Experienced blockchain devs with Solidity and smart contract expertise
- Engineers comfortable working across the stack — React.js/TypeScript + backend APIs
- Frontend developers with deep React.js/Next.js experience and Web3 integration exposure
- Clean, well-structured code habits and Git proficiency
- A team-first, async-friendly, product-focused mindset
- Experience working with existing codebases and iterating fast

NDA is required prior to codebase access and technical call.

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy working on, let’s connect. Apply here: https://www.metabytelabs.com/careers/web3-developer, and feel free to send any questions to 📩careers@metabytelabs.com.
Know someone who’s a fit? Referrals welcome at 📩referrals@metabytelabs.com.

items.title: Tocco - Lead Engineer - Remote - FT
items.description:
## 城市

* 河内，越南（优先）
* 远程

## 薪酬待遇

* 约1000美元/月（根据经验和能力调整）

## 职位要求

* 4年以上软件工程开发经验，优先有早期SaaS或平台产品经验
* 精通TypeScript
* 熟练使用React和Next.js（App Router）
* 能够胜任前端和后端全栈开发
* 有使命感，关注气候与可持续发展相关项目

### 必备技能

* TypeScript
* React / Next.js（App Router）
* Prisma ORM
* Cursor.ai经验
* 熟悉第三方API/服务：Clerk，Algolia，Supabase

### 理想技能

* Clerk
* Supabase
* Algolia，或有为站点内容和内部数据库实现搜索引擎/模块经验
* AI集成，包括OpenAI

### 你将负责

* 负责全栈功能开发，包括前端、后端和内部工具
* 做出架构和技术折中决策，以快速且稳健地推进开发
* 与创始人和技术负责人紧密合作，解决开放性技术挑战
* 快速交付，迭代改进，持续闭环
* 探索AI及材料相关数据集成
* 协助塑造工程文化并推动团队成长

### 你可以为团队带来

* 好奇心和解决复杂技术问题的积极态度
* 责任心和主动的问题解决能力
* 对气候影响和可持续产品开发的热情

### 为什么加入我们很棒

* 成为首批10位核心成员，拥有真正股权
* 参与打造重新定义可持续生产的未来平台
* 远程工作灵活，兼顾低碳环保的团队线下聚会
* 你的工作与技术紧密结合气候使命

### 有趣的工程项目

* 打造结合全球最丰富替代材料数据库与强大工具和内容的B2B平台
* 集成AI工具与材料创新数据，提升采购决策效率
* 设计可扩展的Next.js/TypeScript/Prisma全栈架构
* 开发内部仪表盘和工具，加速平台增长

### 联系人

主页：[[tocco.earth](https://tocco.earth/)](https://tocco.earth)
申请链接：[https://form.typeform.com/to/hBYzXTeP](https://form.typeform.com/to/hBYzXTeP)
邮箱：redpill\_at\_tocco\_dot\_earth

items.title: REMOTE - LEAD ENGINEER
items.description:
## Location

* Remote

## Salary Expectation

* Negotiate

## Requirements
- Minimum of 10 years of experience in a technical role, with at least 3 years as a Technical Architect.
- Expertise in mobile app development technologies such as React Native, Swift, or Kotlin.
- Strong knowledge of cloud services (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and experience in deploying applications in the cloud.
- Proficiency in coding best practices, code reviews, and agile development methodologies.
- Previous experience in successful start-ups is highly desirable.
- Excellent leadership, communication, and collaboration skills.
- Ability to drive innovation and handle multiple priorities and deadlines.

Plus: 
- Experience with edtech domain is preferred.
- Previous experience in product scaling is a plus.

### Responsibilities

ELSA is the smartest Speech AI, backed by Google, on a mission to enable 1.5 billion language learners around the globe to speak English with full confidence and unlock their opportunities in life. ELSA is also Top 5 Best Artificial Intelligence Apps by Research Sniper, and Top 4 Companies Using AI To Transform The World by Forbes.

We are currently seeking a highly-skilled Engineering Lead with a minimum of 10 years of technical experience, to oversee the technical aspects of our product. This role is crucial to our company and involves working closely with Engineering Managers and the Engineering Director. The ideal candidate should have a strong technical background, preferably with experience in successful start-ups, and will be responsible for guiding the technical direction of our mobile app product in the edtech.

Responsibilities:
- Define and implement technical strategies for the product.
- Oversee the architecture of mobile applications and ensure scalability, reliability, and security.
- Work closely with Engineering Managers and Engineering Director to ensure alignment with company objectives.
- Provide technical leadership and guidance to the engineering teams.
- Drive innovation and efficiency in the engineering processes.
- Join during the product’s scale-up phase and contribute significantly to its growth.
- Ensure that technical decisions align with product and business goals.

### Why it would be awesome to work with us
Where you'll be
- We are a distributed workforce with offices in Silicon Valley, Portugal and Vietnam. 
- Where in the world? For this role, we are looking for someone in Asia, which can overlap time with our global teams.
- This is a remote role, with opportunities to travel. 
- Equity/bonus options are available.
### Process:
4 rounds, including meeting with the Board of Directors.
Report to: VP of Product and Engineering

### Contact
Skype: Huehuenoivu
